CustomField.description: If selected, enter a value in the 'Fee Due Day' field based on fixed or relative day settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Specify the day of the month or number of days relative to the Invoice, Fee Start/End Date, based on selected Fee Due Type. If Relative is selected, enter 0 for the same day as the Invoice Date, Fee Start/End Date; enter +ve numbers to add days or -ve numbers to subtract days. If Fixed Date is selected, enter the exact day of the month.
CustomField.label: Fee Due Day
